items.title: Working Notes on Late Interaction Dynamics: Analyzing Targeted Behaviors of Late Interaction Models
items.abstract: While Late Interaction models exhibit strong retrieval performance, many of their underlying dynamics remain understudied, potentially hiding performance bottlenecks. In this work, we focus on two top

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.abstract: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.
